overview: A modern, conversion-focused real estate website for Amaron Group Realtors in Ahmedabad. Features WhatsApp-first lead capture, a property grid with full-detail popup modals, a hot deals ticker, sticky mobile action bar, and trust-building sections covering 17+ years of local expertise.
features: Hero section with trust stats and CTAs
Property grid with full-detail popup modals
Lead capture forms linked to WhatsApp
Sticky mobile bottom bar (Call, WhatsApp, Properties)
SEO-optimized content for SG Highway Ahmedabad
